# Software Mansion Agentic Engineering Guide

> Practical guidance for setting up and scaling agentic engineering workflows in real software projects.

## Documentation Sets

- [Abridged documentation](https://agentic-engineering.swmansion.com/pr-preview/pr-17/llms-small.txt): a compact version of the documentation for Software Mansion Agentic Engineering Guide, with non-essential content removed
- [Complete documentation](https://agentic-engineering.swmansion.com/pr-preview/pr-17/llms-full.txt): the full documentation for Software Mansion Agentic Engineering Guide

## Notes

- The complete documentation includes all content from the official documentation
- The content is automatically generated from the same source as the official documentation
